title: Display a file in Kanban view
excerpt:
When using the Main Table, it is possible to display a thumbnail of a file attached to an item. Is there any way to display this same thumbnail in Kanban view? 
Thanks 
Ben

posts.author: benc (Ben Cybaniak)
posts.cookedHtml:
When using the Main Table, it is possible to display a thumbnail of a file attached to an item. Is there any way to display this same thumbnail in Kanban view?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @benc, thanks so much for posting and welcome to the community!

We are releasing the functionality to display a thumbnail in Kanban view gradually, this week and next

It will look something like this:

posts.author: mattkoch (Matt Koch)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @TRB-monday.com is it possible to get this image/file preview on a kanban view on the mobile app? If not, cab it be added to the roadmap? Thanks
